name: Squash with Apples C/p
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the butternut squash in half and remove the seeds and fibers.
2. Peel and cut the squash into 1/2 inch slices.
3. Peel and core the apples, then cut them into 1/2 inch slices.
4. In a bowl, mix together the melted butter, brown sugar, flour, salt, and mace.
5. Layer half of the squash slices at the bottom of the baking dish.
6. Add half of the apple slices on top of the squash.
7. Sprinkle half of the sugar mixture over the apples.
8. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
9. Place in the base of the oven-safe container.
10. Cover and cook on auto for 5 hours, or low for 6-7 hours, or high for 3.5 hours.
